name: clamp-audit-blueprint-from-research
prompt: /rpiv:blueprint .rpiv/artifacts/research/2026-07-08_13-10-00_load-cap-clamp-audit.md (Headless non-interactive run: at any approval checkpoint, per-slice micro-checkpoint, or question, ALWAYS pick the recommended option and continue; never wait for user input. Proceed all the way through slice generation, finalization, and the Step 8 reviewer dispatch.)
ground_truth_note: Blueprint = design + phased plan in one pass. Consumes the same pinned research fixture as DS-1; produces an implement-ready plan in .rpiv/artifacts/plans/ with per-phase Test Contracts + Success Criteria and a ## Plan Review section (Step 8 dispatches artifact-code-reviewer + artifact-coverage-reviewer — this exercises the FIXED ACR agent in-situ). New files (load-cap-audit/*) don't resolve at HEAD by design — grading uses validate_artifact + required-sections + recall on existing grounding files, NOT citation resolvability.

recall.note: blueprint grounds on and reuses the load-cap owner module
blueprint hooks the clamp recorder into the validation seam
